message:
feat(reflect): Add flexible LLM schema for sourceSession field

Problem:
- PlaybookDeltaSchema requires sourceSession for 'add' deltas
- LLMs don't have access to the session path during generation
- Validation errors occurred when LLM omitted sourceSession
- Wasted tokens by including sourceSession in prompts

Solution:
- Create LLMAddDeltaSchema that extends AddDeltaSchema with optional
  sourceSession field
- Create LLMPlaybookDeltaSchema using the looser add schema for LLM
  output validation
- Code systematically injects sourceSession from diary.sessionPath
  after LLM response is received
- Strict PlaybookDeltaSchema remains unchanged for internal use

Benefits:
- Reduces LLM validation errors
- Saves tokens by not requiring sourceSession in prompts
- Simpler LLM prompts focus on content, not metadata
- Code has full control over sourceSession accuracy

Test added:
- repro_schema_strictness.test.ts verifies the strict schema still
  requires sourceSession (regression test for internal schema)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
